payload.answer: Duplicate Slack retry event detected; no new memory should be created.

entity_resolution.reason: Same Slack event ID was delivered twice; avoid committing duplicate durable memory.

details: Identified repeated delivery of the same Slack event ID.
No memory card emitted to prevent duplicate persistence.
